title: Gaymers iNC. Pride Month Meet-Up with TEKKEN TOURNAMENT!
location: The Old School Yard, 109-111 Long Ln, London
description:
THIS MONTH WE ARE HAVING A TEKKEN TOURNAMENT TO CELEBRATE THE NEW DLC RELEASE OF KUNIMITSU! 🏳️‍🌈WE ARE ALSO CELEBRATING PRIDE MONTH WITH A SWITCH OVERLOAD!🏳️‍🌈 Join us for our monthly gaming meet-up as we take over the whole venue with our TVs and consoles. Go 8-bit in the retro zone or get competitive with […]

\n

title: Gaymers iNC. Monthly Meet-Up
location: The Old School Yard, 109-111 Long Ln, London
description: Projected based on the usual 3rd-Wednesday-of-month cadence at TOSY (The Old School Yard). Specific theme/tournament announced closer to the date on the Gaymers iNC. website.
